title: Fifth Member of Iranian Soccer Team Reverses Decision on Asylum
summary_full: Five of the seven members of the Iranian women’s national team who originally sought asylum in Australia after a tournament have changed their minds.
summary_public: Five of the seven members of the Iranian women’s national team who originally sought asylum in Australia after a tournament have changed their minds.
